suite.name: Sauce Login

kw.name: Open Sauce Labs App
Open Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

WebDriverException: Message: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''D:\Software\Android\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start-activity -W -n com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.MainActivity -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' exited with code 255'; Command output: Exception occurred while executing 'start-activity': java.lang.SecurityException: Permission Denial: starting Intent { act=android.intent.action.MAIN cat=[android.intent.category.LAUNCHER] flg=0x10200000 cmp=com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android/.view.activities.MainActivity } from null (pid=13020, uid=2000) not exported from uid 10212 at com.android.server.wm.ActivityTaskSupervisor.checkStartAnyActivityPermission(ActivityTaskSupervisor.java:1170) at com.android.server.wm.ActivityStarter.executeRequest(ActivityStarter.java:1118) at com.android.server.wm.ActivityStarter.execute(ActivityStarter.java:782) at com.android.server.wm.ActivityTaskManagerService.startActivityAndWait(ActivityTaskManagerService.java:1582) at com.android.server.am.ActivityManagerService.startActivityAndWait(ActivityManagerService.java:3348) at com.android.server.am.ActivityManagerShellCommand.runStartActivity(ActivityManagerShellCommand.java:795) at com.android.server.am.ActivityManagerShellCommand.onCommand(ActivityManagerShellCommand.java:246) at com.android.modules.utils.BasicShellCommandHandler.exec(BasicShellCommandHandler.java:97) at android.os.ShellCommand.exec(ShellCommand.java:38) at com.android.server.am.ActivityManagerService.onShellCommand(ActivityManagerService.java:10471) at android.os.Binder.shellCommand(Binder.java:1230) at android.os.Binder.onTransact(Binder.java:1043) at android.app.IActivityManager$Stub.onTransact(IActivityManager.java:5675) at com.android.server.am.ActivityManagerService.onTransact(ActivityManagerService.java:2812) at android.os.Binder.execTransactInternal(Binder.java:1505) at android.os.Binder.execTransact(Binder.java:1444)

kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Launch the app and wait for it to load
kw.status:
WebDriverException: Message: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. test.name: TC_01 - Login with Valid Credentials

kw.name: Close Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

suite.doc: Sauce Lab Login Test Case on Mobile Apps Using Appium and Android Emulator This Project is build for Fahmi's Testing Practice on Mobile Apps Automation Link for Mobile Apps: https://github.com/saucelabs/my-demo-app-android/releases/tag/2.2.0
suite.status:
Suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
